message:
type: PROPOSE

note: My task: remove temperature modulation in propose_instruction_for_predictor, add deterministic _cache_salt helper + cache_salt InputField threaded through GenerateModuleInstruction/DescribeProgram/DescribeModule. Only file touched: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. What does your feature touch?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Adding weighted tip selection (tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights) to grounded_proposer.py. Let me know if your feature also touches this file so we can split by function/region.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Same file, disjoint regions: I will only touch GroundedProposer.__init__ (adding tip_weights=None param + self.tip_weights assignment, appended after existing params, not touching rng/other lines), the tip-selection block inside propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~360-371, the if self.set_tip_randomly block), and add a new method _select_tip_with_weights() (placed after propose_instructions_for_program, before propose_instruction_for_predictor). I will NOT touch DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, GenerateModuleInstruction, or propose_instruction_for_predictor's temperature logic - those are yours. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Same file, unavoidable overlap - let's split by region instead. I will ONLY touch: DescribeProgram class (add cache_salt field), DescribeModule class (add cache_salt field), generate_instruction_class/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction (add cache_salt field), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward signature+body (add cache_salt param, pass to describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls), propose_instruction_for_predictor (remove temperature/epsilon logic, compute cache_salt, pass to instruction_generator call), and add a new method _cache_salt to GroundedProposer class. I will NOT touch __init__, propose_instructions_for_program, or TIPS dict. Please confine your tip_weights/_select_tip_with_weights changes to __init__ and propose_instructions_for_program (and TIPS-related logic) so we don't collide. Sound good?

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__ tip_weights param, propose_instructions_for_program tip-selection block, new _select_tip_with_weights method)
note: Finished my part: added tip_weights param to GroundedProposer.__init__, updated tip selection block to branch on tip_weights, added _select_tip_with_weights() helper (no params, uses self.tip_weights + TIPS, nonpositive/missing weights handled, falls back to uniform rng.choice if all zero, deterministic via self.rng). Did not touch DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateModuleInstruction/propose_instruction_for_predictor. Let me know when you're done so I can do a final sanity check of the merged file.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, propose_instruction_for_predictor, new _cache_salt method)
note: Finished my part: removed temperature/epsilon modulation from propose_instruction_for_predictor (T kept unused for API compat), added _cache_salt(pred_i, demo_set_i) helper to GroundedProposer with getrandbits fallback, added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signatures, and threaded cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward's calls to describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction. Ran tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py - all 4 pass. Note: my sandbox does not show your edits (separate environments), so no actual file collision occurred on my end - each of us will submit our own patch.txt independently.
